detailed_camera_plan: Follow 秦嬴 as he walks from the center of the room to the dining table and sits opposite to 秦悍.
action_description: 秦嬴坐下与秦悍一同用餐。
staging_description: 餐厅长餐桌，秦悍已就座，秦嬴拉开椅子坐下。

character_poses.秦悍: seated, holding a spoon, looking at 秦嬴

setting_details: Formal dining setup, silverware on the table.
ending_composition_description: Two-shot of 秦嬴 and 秦悍 at the table, table setting centered.
